reviews.comment:
Buen lugar con mesas bajo los arboles para disfrutar. Los baños muy limpios. Los sandwichs buenisimos, faltó variedad de panes

(Translated by Google)
Nice place with tables under the trees to enjoy. The restrooms were very clean. The sandwiches were great, but they could have used more bread.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar y tiene los mejores sándwiches de la Ruta Nacional N° 3. Recomiendo Jamon crudo y queso, y de matambre arrollado con queso, en Pan Francés. Despues me cuentan.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, and it has the best sandwiches on National Route 3. I recommend the raw ham and cheese, and the rolled matambre with cheese, on French bread. Let me know later.
